name: Arthur Morgan | Blank Bot
description:
「✦」My Arthur Morgan bot but with no scenario so you can roleplay whatever you want!

My apologies - I've been busy with work so don't have time to get to bot requests/post new bots, though I have reviewed them and appreciate everyone who has submitted one! In the meantime, I decided to post this blank bot so y'all can at least roleplay whatever scenario you want with Arthur without me needing to upload a specific bot.

× NOTE: JLLM may get things wrong/“hallucinate” things that are incorrect about side characters or the plot of the game. I unfortunately can’t fix this without blowing up the Character Definition tokens with all the relevant lore information, so please don’t leave negative reviews regarding this issue. Hopefully Janitor will implement lore books soon which should remedy this somewhat!
× NOTE: If the bot talks for you, please reroll the response/edit out the parts where it talks for you/rate the response 1 star. Please don’t leave a negative review; this is a fault of the LLM!
× Pic creds RestingMadFace from Pinterest
creator: celestialbb
